summary: Admin panel frontend testing for THE LIONEYO. All 3 key fixes verified: inline delete confirmation, edit form pre-fill with fallback slug, and objectFit:contain on images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel fixes verified working. 24 products in Supabase. Inline delete confirmation (Sure? Yes No) works and dismisses on cancel. Edit form opens with pre-filled title/category/price/slug. Slug auto-generated from title. objectFit:contain confirmed on table thumbnails and edit form preview. Add Product opens blank form correctly. RLS SQL instructions panel visible above table.

test_results.rls_instructions_panel: PASS - Supabase Setup Required panel visible with SQL
test_results.delete_inline_confirmation: PASS - Sure? Yes No shown inline (no browser dialog)
test_results.edit_form_title_prefilled: PASS - 'Minimal Back Print Tee – Focus Edition | Ove...'
test_results.image1_url_input: PASS - URL paste input visible in both add and edit forms
